ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_MZK_TREE_BRANCH.d: The first Attack you play each combat applies [gold]3[/gold] [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DARK_BLUE_TREE.de: Your Attack cards apply [gold]1[/gold] additional [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DETERMINATION.des: When obtained, add [gold]{Cards}[/gold] random Curses to your deck. At the start of each combat, add a [blue]Slimed[/blue] to your hand. [gold]Open the path to Act 4.[/gold]
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OBSERVATION.title: Observation
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OBSERVATION.descr: At the start of each turn, gain [gold]{Block}[/gold] Block.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_TIDEWATCHER_LANTE: Upon pickup, remove all Curses from your deck.
Its wick is steeped in seawater, yet it still burns.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DEEP_BLUE_HEART.d:
When obtained, remove up to [gold]{Cards}[/gold] cards from your deck.
At the start of each combat, gain [gold]{StrengthPower}[/gold] Strength and [gold]{DexterityPower}[/gold] Dexterity.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DEEP_BLUE_HEART.f: When it beats, you could almost believe the whole ocean has accepted you.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SWAN_SONG.title: Swan Song
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SWAN_SONG.descrip: When obtained, choose [gold]{Cards}[/gold] cards in your deck to Enchant with [aqua]Revelation[/aqua].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SWAN_SONG.flavor: The final voice is not an ending, but an echo before the journey home.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OCEAN_PULSE.title: Pulse of the Ocean
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OCEAN_PULSE.descr: Whenever you play a Colorless or Token card, gain [gold]{Block}[/gold] Block.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_OCEAN_PULSE.flavo: Each beat answers a tide that has yet to reach the shore.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_KEY.title: Key
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_KEY.description:
When choosing your next room, you may ignore the current path [blue]{Rooms}[/blue] times. [red]This effect is disabled in multiplayer.[/red]
After combat, you may gain [gold]1[/gold] Key.
[blue]Keys may have other uses...[/blue]
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_KEY.flavor: A precious, hard-won resource. One key will open any lock you choose.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DRIFTING_COFFER.d: When obtained, if you have at least [gold]1[/gold] Key, lose [gold]1[/gold] Key and gain [gold]{Cards}[/gold] card rewards. Otherwise, gain [gold]{Gold}[/gold] Gold.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_DRIFTING_COFFER.f: Its lock was polished smooth by tides that never reached the shore.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_BUOYANT_VESICLE.d: At the start of each combat, [gold]Drift[/gold] [gold]{Float}[/gold].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_BUOYANT_VESICLE.f: Forget 998. Today, it's only 688! Tentacle Care Ointment: for tentacles that look good and feel great.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_JUVENILE_CRADLE.d: ALL [gold]Juvenile Seaborn[/gold] added during combat are Upgraded.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_JUVENILE_CRADLE.f: The young are born knowing which way the tide returns.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SHRINKING_SPINE.d: Whenever a [blue]Neural Burst[/blue] triggers, also apply [gold]{ShrinkPower}[/gold] [blue]Shrink[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_SHRINKING_SPINE.f: The wound does not merely hurt. It teaches the body to recede.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_PACMAN_COLLECTORS: Whenever [blue]Neural Damage[/blue] bursts, apply [gold]{ShrinkPower}[/gold] [blue]Shrink[/blue] to the target.
Colored pixels enter your eyes, then swim back to We Many like some tiny instinct.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_RELIC_BROKEN_DRIFTING_C: A Drifting Coffer opened by force. When obtained, gain [gold]{Gold}[/gold] Gold.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_REWARD_DRIFTING_COFFER_: Open the Drifting Coffer with a Key
Smash the Drifting Coffer with a hammer
